_doc: AU Component Registry: Layer AU (Auth) canonical primitives (FULLSTACK_COMPONENT_LIBRARY_ROADMAP §1, opened 2026-07-17). Adoption measured by the AU-P0 census (to build, per the §1 template) over family pages + auth-touching edge functions. Write-side attribution is ALREADY governed at Layer D (D3 auth_uid ownership 26/26 + bind_* pins): this layer owns the SESSION/IDENTITY floor on the client and the auth entry points.
surfaces: family pages (client auth floor) · login fn · RLS helper fns

components.name: restoreIdentityFromSession
components.api: await restoreIdentityFromSession(db): rebuilds wh_last_worker/wh_active_hive_id from the live session on a fresh device
components.satisfies: no silent identity loss on new devices (C4 class)
components.when_to_use: every page init that reads WORKER_NAME/HIVE_ID
components.exempt_reason: founder-only internal page: its admin boot-gate (isPlatformAdmin via getUser) settles the session and owns identity before any content script runs: the worker identity floor does not apply

components.name: session-settled reads (auth.getUser/getSession before RLS-gated queries)
components.api: await db.auth.getUser(): settles the JWT attach before count/read on cold load
components.need: pages issuing RLS-gated reads at init
components.when_to_use: before the first gated read on any fresh-device path
components.exempt_reason: founder-only internal page: its admin boot-gate (isPlatformAdmin via getUser) settles the session and owns identity before any content script runs: the worker identity floor does not apply

components.name: login lockout RPCs
components.satisfies: brute-force protection with no attacker oracle

components.name: supervisor-reset-password flow
components.api: active-supervisor check → same-hive worker target → tight rate bucket → admin reset + audit log
components.defined_in: supervisor-reset-password fn (verify_jwt=TRUE: deploys separately per runbook)

components.name: role floor: wh_hive_role hint + SERVER re-check
components.api: localStorage wh_hive_role (UI hint only) + v_worker_truth role/hive_status re-check server-side
components.when_to_use: every supervisor/admin gate: UI hint for UX, server check for truth
components.verified_note: AU5 audit 2026-07-17: all 16 role-gated pages verified. 11 carry a server-recheck idiom (v_worker_truth.role / isPlatformAdmin / mkt_admin); the 5 client-hint-only pages (alert-hub, analytics, audit-log, integrations, plant-connections) are enforced by RLS regardless: every backing table is rules-engine SCOPED (hive_audit_log even carries the user_supervisor_hive_ids SELECT policy). ZERO privilege-escalation holes; the client hints are UX over real enforcement: the correct architecture per this row's contract.
